column3:
Picks data source, schema & table from dropdowns
e.g. StarRocks → adjetter → act_quick_ticket_report
column5: ✦  "Ticket data detected. Want me to suggest useful columns & filters?"  [Dismiss · Yes, suggest]
column6:
• Recommends relevant columns from schema
• Suggests common filters (date, status, agent)
• Pre-fills group-by contextually
column7: User skips manual column hunting. Can still adjust any selection.

column3:
Checks columns one by one from list
0/12 → ticket_id, assigned_to, status…
column5: ✦  "I can predict the remaining columns you'll need. Complete for you?"  [Dismiss · Complete selection]
column6:
• Infers intent from already-selected columns
• Auto-checks complementary columns
• Shows reasoning via tooltip on hover
column7: Saves repetitive checkbox work. User sees why each was added and can undo.

column3:
Sets group-by field, adds filter conditions manually
Dropdown → field → operator → value
column5: ✦  "Describe what you want to see — I'll set the grouping & filters."  [Dismiss · Describe it]
column6:
• Accepts plain English — "by agent, last 7 days"
• Sets group-by field + filter values in builder
• Confirms before applying
column7: Removes most error-prone manual step. User describes intent, AI configures.

column1: ② After Query Run — Results Shown

column3:
Clicks Run Query, sees 100-row data table
Scans results to check if they look right
column5: ✦  "Want a plain-English summary of this data, or need to refine it?"  [Dismiss · Summarise · Refine]
column6:
• 2–3 sentence plain English summary of data
• Flags nulls, anomalies, or outliers in results
• Opens 'what to change?' prompt if Refine clicked
column7: User understands data instantly without scanning 100 rows manually.

column3:
Goes back to sidebar, changes columns/filters, re-runs
Repeating the manual selection cycle again
column5: ✦  "Refining? Just tell me what's missing or wrong — I'll update the query."  [Dismiss · Tell KapAI]
column6:
• Accepts delta instruction — "add ticket_type, open only"
• Modifies existing query, not a full rebuild
• Re-runs automatically after user confirms diff
column7: No more re-clicking through the builder. Iterate via natural language.

column3:
Switches to SQL Console tab to manually edit query
Writes or modifies raw SQL
column5: ✦  "Prefer to describe the change? I'll write the SQL for you."  [Dismiss · Describe change]
column6:
• Takes plain English change description
• Modifies existing SQL, shows diff view
• Explains what changed and why
column7: Non-technical users can use the SQL Console via natural language. SQL users unaffected.

column3:
User has written or edited SQL manually
About to click Run Query
column5: ✦  "I spotted a potential issue in this query. Want me to review it?"  [Dismiss · Review]
column6:
• Reviews SQL for logic errors and inefficiencies
• Suggests optimisations (LIMIT, index hints)
• Offers corrected version as a highlighted diff
column7: Catches mistakes before a failed run. Acts as an inline SQL peer reviewer.

column3:
Picks chart type in Save Question dialog
Default Visualization → Table dropdown
column5: ✦  "Based on your data, a Bar Chart grouped by agent would work better."  [Dismiss · Apply suggestion]
column6:
• Analyses result columns & cardinality
• Recommends best-fit chart type with reason
• Auto-sets axes and grouping for the chart
column7: Better default visualisations without user needing chart best-practice knowledge.

column3:
Types question name & description in Save dialog
Often left as 'Untitled Query' with no description
column5: ✦  "Want me to suggest a name and description based on your query?"  [Dismiss · Suggest]
column6:
• Generates a clear, descriptive question name
• Writes one-line description of what it answers
• User can edit both before saving
column7: No more 'Untitled Query' clutter. Questions become searchable and reusable.

column3:
Creates/edits dashboard, adds saved questions, arranges layout
Manual drag-and-drop of widgets
column5: ✦  "I can suggest related saved questions and arrange a layout to start with."  [Dismiss · Show suggestions]
column6:
• Finds related saved questions by topic
• Proposes logical widget layout & order
• Recommends dashboard-level filters
column7: Dashboard assembly accelerated. User refines the AI scaffold manually.
